configPanel.description: Recursive: either a translated leaf string, or a nested object of further translationKey/'_' -> configPanel.

dataEntryFlow.description: Shape shared by 'config', 'options', and each 'config_subentries' entry -- homeassistant/config_entries.py's ConfigFlow/OptionsFlow, from script/hassfest/translations.py gen_data_entry_schema.

abort.description: Keyed by the 'reason' passed to async_abort().

entry_type.description: Required for config_subentries entries (e.g. 'MQTT device'), unused by 'config'/'options'.

error.description: Keyed by the error code set in errors['base'] (or a field name for per-field errors).

flow_title.description: Card title for a flow started by discovery, e.g. '{name}'. Placeholders come from context['title_placeholders'].

initiate_flow.description: Menu label shown when multiple discovery sources can start this flow.

progress.description: Keyed by the progress_action passed to async_show_progress().

data.description: Keyed by the vol.Schema field name for this step's form.

data_description.description: Helper text per field; every key here must also exist in 'data'.

menu_options.description: Keyed by the step_id passed to async_show_menu()'s menu_options.

step.description: Keyed by the step_id (the 'xxx' in async_step_xxx).

title.description: Deprecated since HA 0.109 -- set the integration's title at the root of the file instead, unless it genuinely needs to differ from the flow's title.

issue.description: One repair issue, from script/hassfest/translations.py gen_issues_schema. Exactly one of 'description'/'fix_flow' must be set.

translationKey.description: Approximates homeassistant/script/hassfest/translations.py RE_TRANSLATION_KEY: lowercase letters/digits/hyphen/underscore, no leading/trailing/doubled hyphen or underscore. Enforced at build/CI time by hassfest, not by this schema (JSON Schema propertyNames patterns can't express the 'no doubled separator' part precisely without lookaheads).

translationValue.description: A single translated string. Home Assistant additionally forbids HTML, raw URLs (use description placeholders instead), and placeholders inside single quotes -- not enforced here, checked by hassfest.

description: A Home Assistant integration's translations/<lang>.json (and the source-of-truth strings.json for core integrations), reverse-engineered from home-assistant/core's script/hassfest/translations.py gen_strings_schema as of the 2026.4.0 release, scoped to what a device/service-type custom integration actually uses (the auth-provider, onboarding, and hardware-config-flow schemas that only apply to a handful of core-only integration types are intentionally left out). DO NOT add a '$schema' key to the actual translations/<lang>.json file: Home Assistant's own loader (and hassfest's CI validation, which runs against custom integrations too via home-assistant/actions/hassfest) parses this file with a strict schema that has no 'extra=ALLOW_EXTRA' at the top level, so ANY unrecognized key -- '$schema' included -- fails validation outright. additionalProperties is explicitly false here for the same reason, and '$schema' is also explicitly excluded below as a second, unmissable guard against ever whitelisting it back in.

common.description: Free-standing reusable strings, referenced elsewhere via the '[%key:common::xxx%]' syntax.

conditions.description: Automation condition types this integration provides, keyed by condition type.

config.description: The main config_flow.py ConfigFlow -- the section virtually every integration with config_flow: true in manifest.json populates. flow_title sets the card title shown for a flow started by discovery (e.g. dhcp/zeroconf/integration_discovery), typically '{name}' with a matching title_placeholders entry in context.

config_panel.description: Strings for a custom admin panel, if this integration registers one.

config_subentries.description: One entry per config_subentries subentry type (HA 2024.11+), keyed by subentry type. Unlike 'config'/'options', entry_type and initiate_flow are mandatory here (script/hassfest/translations.py gen_data_entry_schema's subentry_flow=True branch).

conversation.description: Strings for a conversation agent this integration provides.

device.description: Default device name templates, keyed by a device type slug used in DeviceInfo.

state.description: Keyed by the raw state value (e.g. an enum sensor's options).

entity.description: Per-entity-description translations (name/state/state_attributes), from homeassistant.helpers.entity_platform's translation_key mechanism. This is the section a custom integration's platform files (sensor.py, switch.py, ...) usually populate via 'translation_key' on their EntityDescription.

additionalProperties.description: Keyed by platform (sensor, switch, ...); the fallback name/state used when an entity has no translation_key of its own.

exceptions.description: Translated exception messages for HomeAssistantError subclasses that carry a translation_key, keyed by that translation_key.

issues.description: Repair issues raised via homeassistant.helpers.issue_registry, keyed by issue_id.

options.description: The OptionsFlow, if config_flow.py defines async_get_options_flow.

additionalProperties.description: Keyed by the selector's own domain/name.

fields.description: Either { key: 'translation' } (old format) or { key: {name, description} } (new format).

services.description: Custom services this integration registers, keyed by service name. Unlike conditions/triggers, a service's 'fields' entries may also carry a 'sections' grouping -- modeled loosely via 'fields' already accepting arbitrary extra structure through conditionTriggerOrService.

system_health.description: Labels for the integration's system_health.py info callback, shown on the System Health page.

info.description: Keyed by the dict key returned from the info callback.

title.description: Integration display name. Only needs to be set if it must differ from manifest.json's 'name'.

triggers.description: Automation trigger types this integration provides, keyed by trigger type.

title: Home Assistant integration translations file
